name: kolicode-monorepo
description: KoliCode - Three-layer architecture with PostgreSQL and Redis

scripts.docker:clean: docker-compose down -v && echo '✅ All volumes removed'
scripts.db:psql: docker-compose exec postgres psql -U kolicode -d kolicode
scripts.db:backup: docker-compose exec postgres pg_dump -U kolicode kolicode > backups/kolicode_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S).sql
scripts.setup: cp .env.example .env && echo '✅ .env created. Please review and update values.'
scripts.dev:all: npm run docker:up && cd frontend && npm run dev

author: KoliCode Team
